language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the app language, or follow your system preference.

toggles.hideOutdated: Hide Browse mods older than the current game version.
toggles.expandLocker: Start Locker list view with hero cards expanded.
toggles.switchVariants: Installing a new variant disables the old one. Off keeps both active. Updates always replace the old file.
toggles.enableAfterDownload: Enable mods as soon as they finish downloading. Stays disabled if no slot is free.
toggles.confirmProfileUpdate: Confirm before overwriting a profile's saved mods. Off overwrites immediately.
toggles.ignoreConflicts: Hide all conflicts from the Conflicts page. Off shows them.
toggles.discordRpc: Show your current Grimoire activity on your Discord profile. Talks only to your local Discord app and sends nothing to Grimoire.
toggles.contributeSalts: Share the replay keys Steam already caches for matches you view in-game. Sends only the match id, server cluster, and two download keys: no account id, no username, nothing about you or your mods.
toggles.translationMode: Double-click translated labels to suggest edits. Requires Steam sign-in.
toggles.fixUnknown: Match unknown local VPKs against GameBanana to recover names and thumbnails. May hit rate limits on large libraries.
toggles.deadworks: Add a Servers tab to browse and join Deadworks community servers. Required content downloads before connecting.
toggles.performanceConfig: One-click fps boost using Sqooky's community preset. Mods keep working. Remove any time.

cache.wipeMessage: Removes cached mod metadata and sync state. Browse re-syncs from GameBanana next time. Installed mods are not affected.
cache.clearPreviewMessage: Deletes cached preview images to reclaim disk. They regenerate when you next view them. Installed mods are not affected.

toggles.staticGap: Keep the gap fixed. Off lets it expand with weapon spread (not shown in preview).
toggles.disableHeroCrosshairs: Force your custom crosshair on heroes that override it.

empty.noGamePath: Set your Deadlock path or enable dev mode.
empty.noMods: Download mods from Browse or import a custom VPK to get started.

empty.noGamePath: Set your Deadlock path or enable dev mode.

empty.noProfiles: Create a profile to save your current mod setup.

account.deleteMessage: Permanently deletes your account, your likes, and your published profiles from Discover. People who already imported them keep their copy.

importCollection.invalidId: Paste a collection URL or numeric id.
importCollection.pasteHint: Paste a GameBanana collection URL or id. Items queue like any Browse download.
importCollection.scanTitle: Fetch file lists and expand mods with variants
importCollection.noFiles: No downloadable files. This mod may have been removed.
importCollection.variantHint: Check a variant, or leave unchecked to use the most popular file.

importProfile.noFiles: No downloadable files. This mod may have been removed.
importProfile.variantHint: Check a variant, or leave unchecked to use the profile's pinned file.

mergeMods.strictDescription: Stop if two mods touch the same file. Off lets the higher-priority mod win.
mergeMods.localNote: Local mods merge fine but aren't in the share code. Delete the disabled originals and they can't be recovered on unmerge.

multiVpk.uncheckHint: Uncheck any you don't want to install.

welcome.autoexecExists: Existing autoexec.cfg found. Your settings stay intact.
welcome.autoDetectFailed: Auto-detect failed. Browse to your Steam library:

sidebar.updateAvailableTitle: Update available. Click to view release notes.

tooltip.installed: Mods currently in your Deadlock addons folder.
tooltip.browse: Discover and download mods from GameBanana.
tooltip.discover: Browse and import profiles published by other Grimoire users.
tooltip.servers: Browse and join Deadworks community servers.
tooltip.locker: Active cosmetic skins, organized by hero.
tooltip.autoexec: Console commands that run at game launch.
tooltip.conflicts: Mods that overwrite the same game files.
tooltip.profiles: Save and swap sets of enabled mods.

launch.noPath: Configure your Deadlock path in Settings first
launch.moddedStash: Restores stashed mods first, then launches Deadlock via Steam
launch.vanillaStash: A vanilla session is already active. Restore mods first.
launch.vanillaDefault: Temporarily stash mods, launch Deadlock via Steam, then auto-restore after the game starts

vanilla.collapsedTitle_one: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mod stashed. Click to restore now.
vanilla.collapsedTitle_other: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mods stashed. Click to restore now.

toast.restoreFailedRetry_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRetry_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRunning_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.restoreFailedRunning_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_one: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mod.
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_other: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mods.
